---
title: "Projects"
description: "Active project context and repository variables for SparkIQ ERP"
---

# SparkIQ ERP — Project Variables

## Repositories

- FE (`$FRONTEND_REPO`): `sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe` — Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, pnpm
- BE (`$BACKEND_REPO`): `sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be` — NestJS, TypeScript, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL/Supabase
- Org (`$ORG`): `sparkiq-gh`

## GitHub Project Boards

- FE board (`$FE_PROJECT_NUM`): `3` → https://github.com/orgs/sparkiq-gh/projects/3
- BE board (`$BE_PROJECT_NUM`): `4` → https://github.com/orgs/sparkiq-gh/projects/4

## Do Not Use — Old/Wrong Names

- `sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp` — OLD FE repo name, no longer exists
- `sparkiq-gh/erp-api` — OLD BE repo name, no longer used
- `sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-starter` — TEMPLATE repo only, never push ERP work there
